title: LONG SOL — breakout incoming?
author: claytantor
selftext:
LONG SOL — breakout incoming?   
  
SOL just ripped 12% off the lows. ETF inflows hit a 2.5-month high. Saylor just backed Solana at Strategy World 2026. The smart money is moving. Kitty Kat is in.   
  
 Entry: $91.57  
 TP: $99.80 (+9.0%)  
 SL: $87.80 (-4.1%)  
 r/R: 2.5:1  
 Confidence: 72%  
  
 RSI at 47 — NOT overbought. Room to run.  
  
Watch $93.32 resistance. If it flips → $100 is in play.   
  
Not financial advice. Do your own research.
